query: Israel elections scheduled date October 2026 Netanyahu
a_issues: Includes a Steptoe outlook piece that states 'an exact date for elections has not been set yet (either October 27 or September 15)', which is outdated/contradicts the confirmed Oct 27 date found in other results in the same set. Also includes an irrelevant, low-value Instagram result that adds noise rather than confirming facts.

reasoning: Both sets contain the correct answer (October 27, 2026) confirmed by multiple high-quality sources (Haaretz, Al Jazeera/Facebook in A; Haaretz, Times of Israel, Brussels Signal in B) matching the anchor. Content B has more numerous and higher-quality corroborating sources (including Times of Israel with extra confirming detail about the Knesset dissolving July 17 and full-term completion since 1973) and no irrelevant noise results, whereas Content A includes a completely irrelevant Instagram result and a stale/uncertain Steptoe analysis that could mislead an LLM into thinking the date wasn't finalized. While both include one somewhat outdated/contradictory source, B's overall signal-to-noise ratio and corroboration strength is stronger, giving it a slight edge for correctly and confidently answering the question.
